title: Burn Bright, Die Young
html: Stub. The Jobs/Tupac/Kobe canon: lives compressed by ambition and ended early, treated as the aspirational template by 15-year-old Yahir in 2020 03 06 short story. Sits in tension with the memento mori / Stoic frame Yahir adopts later.
